verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Overwhelmed, a weary soul I find no end to the confusion here below A restless heart in troubled times Searching for a place of rest, some peace of mind Yet on my knees I've come to know of the love the you bestow and the place prepared for me I want to go

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take me home Take me home I just want to lay before Your throne And feel Your touch to rest my soul I just wish You'd come and take me home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And like a child away from home Crying for his father's soft and soothing touch I long to be with family And with the saints of old to spend eternity And in the stillness here I lay in a cool of tears I pray That in some amazing way You'd come today

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And in the stillness here I lay (here I lay) in a cool of tears I pray (tears I pray) That in some amazing way You'd come today And take me home (take me home) and take me home (home) I just want to lay before Your throne (throne) Oh and feel your touch to rest my weary soul I just wish You'd come and take me home I just wish You'd come and take me home Home… please take me home
